## Summary

Describe the change and its user-visible effect.

## Changed module

- [ ] Portal
- [ ] Product Development
- [ ] Sensory
- [ ] Shelf Life
- [ ] QA Dashboard
- [ ] Shared contracts
- [ ] Root tooling or documentation

## Reason

Explain why the change is needed and how it stays within the intended scope.

## Tests

List the commands and focused checks that passed.

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for visible changes, or state `Not applicable`.

## Scientific disclaimer impact

Explain whether assumptions, limitations, scientific wording, transfer privacy, or regulatory disclaimers changed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I changed only the intended module or shared contract.
- [ ] I did not commit credentials, personal data, real customer data, generated builds, or dependency folders.
- [ ] Existing tests pass and new behaviour has proportionate coverage.
- [ ] Production builds pass for affected applications.
- [ ] Transfer schema compatibility and shared identifiers remain valid where applicable.
- [ ] Scientific limitations remain visible and no commercial or regulatory validation is claimed.
- [ ] Documentation and screenshots are updated where needed.
